officialSources.title: Suno v5.5: More Expressive. More You.

suno/v5.5.description: Latest flagship AI music generation model. Most expressive model yet with support for Voices, Custom Models, and My Taste personalization features.
suno/v5.5.notes: Available on Pro and Premier plans. Supports voice capture, custom model tuning with up to 3 custom models for Pro and Premier subscribers.

suno/v5.description: Previous generation model. Studio-quality music generation.
suno/v5.notes: Legacy model. Superseded by v5.5 for most use cases.

suno/v4.5-plus.description: Enhanced version of v4.5 with improved quality.

suno/v4.5-all.description: Default model available on the Free plan.

suno/personas.description: Reusable style and voice personalization capability.
suno/personas.notes: Available on Pro and Premier plans.

music-generation.description: Generate full songs with vocals and instrumentals from text prompts.

studio.description: Advanced studio environment for music production. Available on Premier plan.

personas.description: Reusable style and voice personalization. Available on Pro and Premier.

advanced-editing.description: Advanced editing tools including stem separation and voice recording.

stem-separation.description: Split songs into vocal and instrument stems. Additional stem types available on Premier.

voice-recording.description: Record and upload your voice to create music with your own voice.

audio-upload.description: Upload audio files. Free: up to 8 min. Pro/Premier: up to 30 min.

custom-models.description: Tune v5.5 using your own audio to build a personalized version of the model that knows your style. Pro and Premier subscribers can create up to three.

my-taste.description: Personalization feature that learns your favorite genres and moods over time. Available for everyone.

voices.description: Capture your voice and create music with it. Includes verification process. Available for Pro and Premier subscribers.

commercial-use.description: Commercial use rights for new songs made. Available on Pro and Premier.

api.description: Programmatic access to Suno music generation.

plans.notes: 50 credits renew daily. No commercial use. Standard features only. Upload up to 8 min of audio. Shared creation queue. No add-on credit purchases. No stem separation.

2,500 credits/month. Commercial use rights. Standard stem separation. Upload up to 30 min of audio. Priority queue. Early access to new features. Ability to purchase add-on credits. Annual billing: $96/year (save $24).
10,000 credits/month. Includes Suno Studio. Advanced stem separation (more stem types). All Pro features plus highest generation limits. Annual billing: $288/year (save $72).
Usage-based API pricing. Pricing not publicly published; contact Suno for current rates.

models.notes: API pricing not publicly published. Contact Suno for current rates.
API pricing not publicly published. Contact Suno for current rates.

creditSystem.description: Suno uses a credit-based system for music generation. Credit consumption varies by model and generation complexity. Check official documentation for exact usage.

commercialUse.description: Commercial use rights require a paid subscription (Pro or Premier).

apiPricing.notes: API pricing is usage-based and not publicly documented. For current rates, contact Suno directly.

notes: Suno operates a freemium model with three tiers: Free (50 daily credits), Pro (2,500 monthly credits, $10/month or $96/year), and Premier (10,000 monthly credits, $30/month or $288/year). v5.5 is the latest flagship model with Voices, Custom Models, and My Taste features. The Free plan uses v4.5-all. Paid plans include commercial use rights, stem separation, priority queues, and access to v5.5. Annual billing saves approximately $24 (Pro) and $72 (Premier).
